summary: Professional remaster of a soundboard capture delivers crystal‑clear audio of a splendid, high‑energy show highlighted by an electrifying Jack Straw.
review: The reviewer praises the band’s “splendid playing” and engaging energy throughout the night, calling the performance one of the finest of 1982. The recording has been professionally remastered by Jeff Norman at Warner Bros., resulting in an excellent‑quality soundboard source that sounds crisp and clear. Jack Straw’s opening bars receive special mention as a standout moment.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, detailed five‑star review lauds both the musical performance and the professional remastering, indicating an exceptional show with excellent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Professional Warner Bros. remaster by Jeff Norman; crisp, clear, well‑balanced sound throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Consistently engaging and energetic performance with strong momentum from start to finish.
